TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Alexander Van Der Bellen = Alexander Van Der Bellen (Kari Doicu: Alexander Van der Bellen, pnhnang kari Doicu: (ňĆal…õ'ksand…ź fan d…õ…źŐĮ 'b…õl…ôn); kngkawas 1944 idas 1 diyax 18-) hiya u taxa Austria seyji jnwu mi keyjay sweycya, soto Austria saya. Slxan pkla Kndadax Estonia kana ka tama bubu niya, kiya ka sediq mqraqil qnduriq mnniq Stalin cuyi snpeyyah Suryeyn. Mntuting snpeyyah Russia Soviet Ryeynpang Syakay Cuyi Konghkwo, tama niya u niqan dara sediq Ucilung Baltic Doicu, sediq Netherlands mi sediq Estonia. Alexander Van Der Bellen u taxa mnalix mptusa pyasan tubeyhing, ini sangay tmsa cida han pa mnniq mptusa Pyasan Vienna Tubeyhing cyawso keyjayswey. Hiya u mnMsama Tang, mniq kngkawas 1994 dhuq kngkawas 2012 mnuda Kokomin Gikay giying, mncusi Msama Tang Gikay kaygi, mniq kngkawas 1997 dhuq kngkawas 2008 qmpah Msama Tang ryeynpang mprngaw kari. Mniq kngkawas 2016 seyngkyo soto Austria u murux hniwan niya miyah seyngkyo, kiya mi Msama Tang ka dmkuh hiya. Mniq soto seyngkyo tu2 meytaq hyo, sntama hyo pnoda patas dnurun sntikuh bay hyo ka wada mbiyax mangal, mangal 50.3% mbiyax mi ini niya baka ka hosweyjn Austria Mtrawah Tang Norbert Gerwald Hofer, binaw mnhdu kana seyngkyo pa, alaw hyo seyngkyo pnadas dnurun ka hidoyi balay mqbling, hiti daw wada spoxan hoying keyngpo. Alexander Van Der Bellen u dmkuh hwanpaw mi syakay mtrawah cuyi cngco, kiya mi dmkuh O Co Ryeynmong. Mniq kngkawas 2016 idas 12 diyax 4 kcka snburah seyngkyo dungan ka Soto Austria, Alexander Van Der Bellen u mniq kcka tumn1 meytaq hyo u wada mangal 51.7% hyo mi wada niya ini baka ka hosweynjn Mtrawah Tang Norbert Gerwald Hofer (wada mangal hyo 48.3%), wada mbiyax mangal Soto Austria Ryeynpang. Alaw Ibiza Jikeyng mi Jnmin Tang tuhuy Mtrawah Tang ccng ryeynmong ka mhdu, kngkawas 2019 idas 5 diyax 27 cida, Kuttz seyhu u wada spuda Kokomin Gikay puda ini sruwa snhiyi tonggi malax qpahun, kiya mwaya balay ndanan rikisi Austria. Alaw msdalih knbeyhing seyngkyo miyah 3 idas sngari, Alexander Van Der Bellen u mndungus balay plixan niya ka Sebastian Kurz daw, spuda niya biyax rngiyan, psdhu phiyu Uaka Tangpay na ka ida mnhoying keyngpo sosi hwakwan Brigitte Bierlein ka ngalan congri. Niyi uri ka mwaya balay niqan soto muda mndungus balay biya, muda nanaq psdhu phiyu burah congri. Kngkawas 2020 idas 5 diyax 24, Alexander Van Der Bellen soto pa alaw wada smliq pnwaya hmtur runan narux brah Uhan , cka rabi ida wa mniq sanan mkan uqun msupu mkan cida u wada kasi qrapi keysacu qnlhangan dha.
S.PHON: = al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn = al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn (ka…ĺi doi ¶u: al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn, pnńßnaŇč ka…ĺi doi ¶u: (*al*'ksand* *an d*** 'b*l…ôn); kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **-) ńßija u taxa aust…ĺia s…ô…üi …ünwu mi k…ô…üaj sw…ô ¶ja, soto aust…ĺia saja. slxan pkla kndadax …ôstonia kana ka tama bubu nija, kija ka s…ôdiq mq…ĺaqil qndu…ĺiq mnniq stalin ¶uji snp…ôjańß su…ĺj…ôn. mntutiŇč snp…ôjańß …ĺussia so*i…ôt …ĺj…ônpaŇč sjakaj ¶uji koŇčńßkwo, tama nija u niqan da…ĺa s…ôdiq u ¶iluŇč balti ¶ doi ¶u, s…ôdiq n…ôtńß…ô…ĺlands mi s…ôdiq …ôstonia. al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn u taxa mnalix mptusa pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč, ini saŇčaj tmsa ¶ida ńßan pa mnniq mptusa pjasan *i…ônna tub…ôńßiŇč ¶jawso k…ô…üajsw…ô. ńßija u mnmsama taŇč, mniq kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** mnuda kokomin gikaj gijiŇč, mn ¶usi msama taŇč gikaj kajgi, mniq kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** qmpańß msama taŇč …ĺj…ônpaŇč mp…ĺŇčaw ka…ĺi. mniq kŇčkawas **** s…ôŇčkjo soto aust…ĺia u mu…ĺux ńßniwan nija mijańß s…ôŇčkjo, kija mi msama taŇč ka dmkuńß ńßija. mniq soto s…ôŇčkjo tu* m…ôtaq ńßjo, sntama ńßjo pnoda patas dnu…ĺun sntikuńß baj ńßjo ka wada mbijax maŇčal, maŇčal **.*% mbijax mi ini nija baka ka ńßosw…ô…ün aust…ĺia mt…ĺawańß taŇč no…ĺb…ô…ĺt g…ô…ĺwald ńßo*…ô…ĺ, binaw mnńßdu kana s…ôŇčkjo pa, alaw ńßjo s…ôŇčkjo pnadas dnu…ĺun ka ńßidoji balaj mqbliŇč, ńßiti daw wada spoxan ńßojiŇč k…ôŇčpo. al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn u dmkuńß ńßwanpaw mi sjakaj mt…ĺawańß ¶uji ¶Ňč ¶o, kija mi dmkuńß o ¶o …ĺj…ônmoŇč. mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax * k ¶ka snbu…ĺańß s…ôŇčkjo duŇčan ka soto aust…ĺia, al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn u mniq k ¶ka tumn* m…ôtaq ńßjo u wada maŇčal **.*% ńßjo mi wada nija ini baka ka ńßosw…ôn…ün mt…ĺawańß taŇč no…ĺb…ô…ĺt g…ô…ĺwald ńßo*…ô…ĺ (wada maŇčal ńßjo **.*%), wada mbijax maŇčal soto aust…ĺia …ĺj…ônpaŇč. alaw ibi*a …üik…ôŇč mi …ünmin taŇč tuńßuj mt…ĺawańß taŇč ¶ ¶Ňč …ĺj…ônmoŇč ka mńßdu, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, kutt* s…ôńßu u wada spuda kokomin gikaj puda ini s…ĺuwa snńßiji toŇčgi malax qpańßun, kija mwaja balaj ndanan …ĺikisi aust…ĺia. alaw msdalińß knb…ôńßiŇč s…ôŇčkjo mijańß * idas sŇča…ĺi, al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn u mnduŇčus balaj plixan nija ka s…ôbastian ku…ĺ* daw, spuda nija bijax …ĺŇčijan, psdńßu pńßiju uaka taŇčpaj na ka ida mnńßojiŇč k…ôŇčpo sosi ńßwakwan b…ĺigitt…ô bi…ô…ĺl…ôin ka Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi. niji u…ĺi ka mwaja balaj niqan soto muda mnduŇčus balaj bija, muda nanaq psdńßu pńßiju bu…ĺańß ¶oŇč…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn soto pa alaw wada smliq pnwaja ńßmtu…ĺ …ĺunan na…ĺux b…ĺańß uńßan , ¶ka …ĺabi ida wa mniq sanan mkan uqun msupu mkan ¶ida u wada kasi q…ĺapi k…ôsa ¶u qnlńßaŇčan dńßa.
S.FORM: = Alexander Van Der Bellen = Alexander Van Der Bellen (Kari Doicu: Alexander Van der Bellen, pnhnang kari Doicu: (ňĆal…õ'ksand…ź fan d…õ…źŐĮ 'b…õl…ôn); kngkawas 1944 idas 1 diyax 18-) hiya u taxa Austria seyji jnwu mi keyjay sweycya, soto Austria saya. Slxan pkla Kndadax Estonia kana ka tama bubu niya, kiya ka sediq mqraqil qnduriq mnniq Stalin cuyi snpeyyah Suryeyn. Mntuting snpeyyah Russia Soviet Ryeynpang Syakay Cuyi Konghkwo, tama niya u niqan dara sediq Ucilung Baltic Doicu, sediq Netherlands mi sediq Estonia. Alexander Van Der Bellen u taxa mnalix mptusa pyasan tubeyhing, ini sangay tmsa cida han pa mnniq mptusa Pyasan Vienna Tubeyhing cyawso keyjayswey. Hiya u mnMsama Tang, mniq kngkawas 1994 dhuq kngkawas 2012 mnuda Kokomin Gikay giying, mncusi Msama Tang Gikay kaygi, mniq kngkawas 1997 dhuq kngkawas 2008 qmpah Msama Tang ryeynpang mprngaw kari. Mniq soto seyngkyo tu2 meytaq hyo, sntama hyo pnoda patas dnurun sntikuh bay hyo ka wada mbiyax mangal, mangal 50.3% mbiyax mi ini niya baka ka hosweyjn Austria Mtrawah Tang Norbert Gerwald Hofer, binaw mnhdu kana seyngkyo pa, alaw hyo seyngkyo pnadas dnurun ka hidoyi balay mqbling, hiti daw wada spoxan hoying keyngpo. Mniq kngkawas 2016 idas 12 diyax 4 kcka snburah seyngkyo dungan ka Soto Austria, Alexander Van Der Bellen u mniq kcka tumn1 meytaq hyo u wada mangal 51.7% hyo mi wada niya ini baka ka hosweynjn Mtrawah Tang Norbert Gerwald Hofer (wada mangal hyo 48.3%), wada mbiyax mangal Soto Austria Ryeynpang. Alaw msdalih knbeyhing seyngkyo miyah 3 idas sngari, Alexander Van Der Bellen u mndungus balay plixan niya ka Sebastian Kurz daw, spuda niya biyax rngiyan, psdhu phiyu Uaka Tangpay na ka ida mnhoying keyngpo sosi hwakwan Brigitte Bierlein ka ngalan congri. Niyi uri ka mwaya balay niqan soto muda mndungus balay biya, muda nanaq psdhu phiyu burah congri. Kngkawas 2020 idas 5 diyax 24, Alexander Van Der Bellen soto pa alaw wada smliq pnwaya hmtur runan narux brah Uhan , cka rabi ida wa mniq sanan mkan uqun msupu mkan cida u wada kasi qrapi keysacu qnlhangan dha.

ńßjo **.*%), wada mbijax maŇčal soto aust…ĺia …ĺj…ônpaŇč. alaw ibi*a …üik…ôŇč mi …ünmin taŇč tuńßuj mt…ĺawańß taŇč ¶ ¶Ňč …ĺj…ônmoŇč ka mńßdu, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, kutt* s…ôńßu u wada mnduŇčus balaj plixan nija ka s…ôbastian ku…ĺ* daw, spuda nija bijax …ĺŇčijan, psdńßu pńßiju uaka taŇčpaj na ka ida mnńßojiŇč k…ôŇčpo sosi ńßwakwan b…ĺigitt…ô bi…ô…ĺl…ôin ka Ňčalan ¶oŇč…ĺi. niji u…ĺi ka mwaja balaj niqan soto muda mnduŇčus balaj bija, muda nanaq psdńßu pńßiju bu…ĺańß ¶oŇč…ĺi. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **, al…ôxand…ô…ĺ *an d…ô…ĺ b…ôll…ôn soto pa alaw wada smliq pnwaja ńßmtu…ĺ
